description_long: This is a robust, industrial fire hydrant painted in a bright yellow color, commonly used for high visibility in urban environments. The hydrant features a cylindrical body with a domed top, three hose connection outlets, and a prominent central operating nut on the top. Metal chains are attached to the side caps, preventing the loss of the caps when removed for hose attachment. The base of the hydrant is wider and shows some wear and discoloration, likely from contact with the ground and exposure to the elements. Manufacturer and model markings are embossed on the front, providing identification and technical information. The surface is hard, metallic, and slightly rough, with bolts securing the base and caps.
description: A yellow, metal fire hydrant with three hose outlets, chained caps, and embossed manufacturer markings. The surface is hard, slightly rough, and shows signs of outdoor wear.
description_view_0: This view shows the hydrant from a slight angle, highlighting the central outlet and the chain attached to the cap, with the domed top and bolts at the base visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays the embossed manufacturer and model markings, all three hose outlets, and both chains attached to the side caps.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the single side outlet and the chain, with the top nut and base bolts also visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows all three outlets and both chains, with the manufacturer's logo and model number clearly visible on the body.
